mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, task_type_code, display_name, descriptor::text as descriptor_text, descriptor_version, source, declared_by_worker_code, status, first_declared_at, last_declared_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into batch.custom_task_type_registry ( tenant_id, task_type_code, display_name, descriptor, descriptor_version, source, declared_by_worker_code, status, first_declared_at, last_declared_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{taskTypeCode}, #{displayName}, cast(#{descriptor} as jsonb), #{descriptorVersion}, 'SDK_DECLARED', #{declaredByWorkerCode}, 'ACTIVE', current_timestamp, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, current_timestamp ) on conflict (tenant_id, task_type_code) do update set display_name = excluded.display_name, descriptor = excluded.descriptor, descriptor_version = excluded.descriptor_version, declared_by_worker_code = excluded.declared_by_worker_code, status = 'ACTIVE', last_declared_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.select: select from batch.custom_task_type_registry where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and status = 'ACTIVE' order by task_type_code
